question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: The release, it took over 5 hours to get it out

assessment.note: He named a concrete release delay, which signals some execution friction and mild engagement cost, but the answer did not specify cause or stress level.

new_queue.label: Hidden blockers
new_queue.name: What dependency is most likely to quietly stall you next?

new_queue.label: Escalation point
new_queue.name: What part of this work needs escalation from me now?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Sustainable pace
new_queue.name: What would make your current pace hard to sustain for another month?

new_queue.label: Recovery pattern
new_queue.name: How are you actually recovering between workdays?

new_queue.label: Ownership signal
new_queue.name: Where have you been leaning in without being asked lately?

new_queue.label: Stretch edge
new_queue.name: What kind of work would stretch you in a useful way right now?

new_queue.label: Drift check
new_queue.name: What part of your work has started to feel like maintenance?

new_queue.label: Feedback loop
new_queue.name: Where are you getting the kind of feedback that actually helps you improve?

new_queue.label: Decision clarity
new_queue.name: Which decision do you wish were made sooner?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What do you need from me that you are not getting yet?

new_queue.label: Learning edge
new_queue.name: What have you been learning on the job that you want more of?

history.answer_excerpt: The release, it took over 5 hours to get it out
The release, it took over 5 hours to get it out
